name: notifications
title: Push Notifications
description: Echoes new notifications to your device's push notifications when Noterook is open in the background.

followedUsers.name: Followed users
followedUsers.tooltip: List of users you will receive additional notifications from.

followedTags.name: Followed tags
followedTags.tooltip: List of tags (one per line, case-insensitive) you will be notified of
